title: Display screen, mobile terminal having display screen, method and device for controlling display screen
abstract: A display screen, a mobile terminal having the display screen, a method and device for controlling the display screen is provided by the present disclosure. The display screen includes a display panel. The display panel includes an active area and a functional area. The active area is configured to display information. The functional area is operable in a first mode for displaying the information or a second mode for allowing light to pass through.
